data.name: Weekend Romance
data.detailed_description:
Weekend Romance unveils the weekend adventure between Margaret, a bubbly young sorcerer, and her more experienced lover, Arabelle. The plot thickens as two other women also find Margaret unresistible.

Pick your path carefully, as your decisions can aid Margaret in sweetening her weekend getaway. Choose your costume, tease your lover, and witness the impact of your choices as the narrative unfolds.



FEATURES
  • A beautifully crafted anime-style visual novel.
  • Mesmerizing storytelling peppered with choices to fit your playstyle.
  • A more personalized experience with costume choices.
  • Encounter a total of 4 main characters, each with their own unique backgrounds and narratives.
  • Immerse your journey with soothing music and a wide array of sound effects.
  • Collect various in-game achievements!


Margaret's available costume.

Weekend Romance invites you to experience Margaret's spicy weekend firsthand. Are you ready to help Margaret cruise her love affair?

data.short_description: Margaret is about to enjoy her weekend getaway with her girlfriend, Arabelle, when Arabelle decides to bring two unexpected guests to spice up their romantic life. What would Margaret do when three women want to be intimate with her? Play now!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu / SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
